steps.arguments:
{"inp": {"code":"# Calculations for Copel (Companhia Paranaense de Energia) indicators
from decimal import Decimal
# Input values from data (all in BRL)
# Total shares
shares = 2982810591
price = 9.51
# Balance sheet (Último 2024-12-31)
total_assets = 57384156000.0
current_assets = 13041808000.0
cash = 4161939000.0
financial_investments = 632000.0
noncurrent_assets = 44342348000.0
# Liabilities
current_liabilities = 10342380000.0
short_loans = 3256315000.0  # 2.01.04
long_loans = 13989844000.0  # 2.02.01
other_noncurrent = 4562842000.0
equity = 25636935000.0  # 2.03 Patrimônio Líq Consolidado
# Income statement (12 months)
revenue_12 = 22651036000.0  # 3.01
cogs_12 = -17759792000.0
gross_profit_12 = 4891244000.0  # 3.03
operating_exp_12 = -826996000.0
ebit_12 = 4064248000.0  # 3.05
financial_result_12 = -1157014000.0
profit_before_tax_12 = 2907234000.0
income_tax_12 = -599435000.0
net_income_12 = 2799370000.0  # 3.11 Lucro/Prejuízo Consolidado do Período
net_income_control_12 = 2809631000.0  # 3.11.01 Atribuído a Sócios da Empresa Controladora
# Depreciation/amortization (retenções)
dep_amort_12 = 1465478000.0  # absolute
# For 3-month (quarter Oct-Dec) compute as diff between full-year and YTD to 2024-09-30 (from previous dataset)
revenue_ytd_sep = 16631872000.0  # 3.01 in 2024-09 report
ebit_ytd_sep = 3141617000.0  # 3.05 in 2024-09 report
net_income_ytd_sep = 2224206000.0  # 3.11 in 2024-09 report
# Cash flow debentures info exists but no explicit outstanding debentures in balance sheet
# Compute gross debt as short_loans + long_loans (no separate debentures line available)
gross_debt = short_loans + long_loans
# Disponibilidades = cash + financial investments
disponibilidades = cash + financial_investments
# Net debt
net_debt = gross_debt - disponibilidades
# Market cap
market_cap = price * shares
# Enterprise Value (EV) = market_cap + gross_debt - cash (using disponiblidades)
EV = market_cap + gross_debt - disponibilidades
# EBITDA
ebitda_12 = ebit_12 + dep_amort_12
# Per-share metrics
revenue_per_share_12 = revenue_12 / shares
ebit_per_share_12 = ebit_12 / shares
net_income_per_share_12 = net_income_control_12 / shares
assets_per_share = total_assets / shares
current_assets_per_share = current_assets / shares
working_capital = current_assets - current_liabilities
working_capital_per_share = working_capital / shares
book_value_per_share = equity / shares
# 3-month (quarter) values
revenue_q = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd_sep
ebit_q = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd_sep
net_income_q = net_income_12 - net_income_ytd_sep
# Ratios
pl = price / net_income_per_share_12 if net_income_per_share_12!=0 else None
pvp = price / book_value_per_share if book_value_per_share!=0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share_12 if ebit_per_share_12!=0 else None
psr = price / revenue_per_share_12 if revenue_per_share_12!=0 else None
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share!=0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / working_capital_per_share if working_capital_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / current_assets_per_share if current_assets_per_share!=0 else None
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_12 if ebitda_12!=0 else None
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
lpa = net_income_per_share_12
vpa = book_value_per_share
# Margins percentages (as percent numbers, two decimals later)
marg_bruta = gross_profit_12 / revenue_12 * 100 if revenue_12!=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_12 / revenue_12 * 100 if revenue_12!=0 else None
marg_liquida = net_income_12 / revenue_12 * 100 if revenue_12!=0 else None
# EBIT / Ativo
ebit_over_assets = ebit_12 / total_assets * 100 if total_assets!=0 else None
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa) *100
fornecedores = 2324423000.0  # current suppliers 2.01.02
roic_denom = total_assets - fornecedores - cash
roic = ebit_12 / roic_denom * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else None
# ROE = net_income / equity *100
roe = net_income_12 / equity * 100 if equity!=0 else None
# Liquidez Corr = ativo circulante / passivo circulante
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities if current_liabilities!=0 else None
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = gross_debt / equity if equity!=0 else None
# Giro Ativos = receita / ativos
giro_ativos = revenue_12 / total_assets if total_assets!=0 else None
# Prepare results dictionary
results = {
    'Ativo': total_assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': gross_debt,
    'Dív. Líquida': net_debt,
    'Patrim. L3q': equity, # minor glitch placeholder but we'll use correct key later
}
# Assemble output mapping to expected indicator names
output = {
    'Ativo': total_assets,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
    'Dív. Bruta': gross_debt,
    'Dív. Líquida': net_debt,
    'Patrim. L
Dq': equity, # placeholder not used
}
# Build list of indicators required by schema
indicators = {
 'Ativo': total_assets,
 'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
 'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
 'Dív. Bruta': gross_debt,
 'Dív. Líquida': net_debt,
 'Patrim. L
q': equity,
}
# Create final mapping for all enum indicators
final = {
 'Ativo': total_assets,
 'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
 'Ativo Circulante': current_assets,
 'Dív. Bruta': gross_debt,
 'Dív. Líquida': net_debt,
 'Patrim. L
Dq': equity,
 'Receita L�ADquida (12 meses)': revenue_12,
 'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_12,
 'Lucro L�ADquido (12 meses)': net_income_12,
 'Receita L�ADquida (3 meses)': revenue_q,
 'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_q,
 'Lucro L�ADquido (3 meses)': net_income_q,
 'P/L': pl,
 'P/VP': pvp,
 'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
 'PSR': psr,
 'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
 'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
 'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
 'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
 'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
 'LPA': lpa,
 'VPA': vpa,
 'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
 'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
 'Marg. L�ADquida': marg_liquida,
 'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_over_assets,
 'ROIC': roic,
 'ROE': roe,
 'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
 'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
 'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}
# Clean keys to match exact enum names from schema
# Schema names in enum contain accents exactly as in developer list. We'll map properly.
mapping = {
 'Ativo': 'Ativo',
 'Disponibilidades': 'Disponibilidades',
 'Ativo Circulante': 'Ativo Circulante',
 'Dív. Bruta': 'D\u00edv. Bruta',
 'Dív. Líquida': 'D\u00edv. L\u00edquida',
 'Patrim. L\u00edq': 'Patrim. L\u00edq',
}
# Instead of complicated remapping, produce final list matching exact enum keys provided in schema
output_list = []
# Build values using previously computed variables and precise keys
from math import isfinite
def fmt_percent(x):
    return round(x,2) if x is not None else None
res = {
"Ativo": total_assets,
"Disponibilidades": disponibilidades,
"Ativo Circulante": current_assets,
"Dív. Bruta": gross_debt,
"Dív. Líquida": net_debt,
"Patrim. Líq": equity,
"Receita Ldquida (12 meses)": revenue_12,
"EBIT (12 meses)": ebit_12,
"Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)": net_income_12,
"Receita L�edquida (3 meses)": revenue_q,
"EBIT (3 meses)": ebit_q,
"Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)": net_income_q,
"P/L": round(pl,2) if pl is not None else None,
"P/VP": round(pvp,2) if pvp is not None else None,
"P/EBIT": round(p_ebit,2) if p_ebit is not None else None,
"PSR": round(psr,2) if psr is not None else None,
"P/Ativos": round(p_ativos,2) if p_ativos is not None else None,
"P/Cap. Giro": round(p_cap_giro,2) if p_cap_giro is not None else None,
"P/Ativ Circ Liq": round(p_ativ_circ_liq,2) if p_ativ_circ_liq is not None else None,
"EV / EBITDA": round(ev_ebitda,2) if ev_ebitda is not None else None,
"EV / EBIT": round(ev_ebit,2) if ev_ebit is not None else None,
"LPA": round(lpa,6),
"VPA": round(vpa,6),
"Marg. Bruta": fmt_percent(marg_bruta),
"Marg. EBIT": fmt_percent(marg_ebit),
"Marg. L�edquida": fmt_percent(marg_liquida),
"EBIT / Ativo": fmt_percent(ebit_over_assets),
"ROIC": fmt_percent(roic),
"ROE": fmt_percent(roe),
"Liquidez Corr": round(liquidez_corr,2) if liquidez_corr is not None else None,
"Div Br/ Patrim": round(divbr_patrim,2) if divbr_patrim is not None else None,
"Giro Ativos": round(giro_ativos,4) if giro_ativos is not None else None
}
# Print for inspection
import json
print(json.dumps(res, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
# Return results object
res
"} }

{"inp":{"code":"# Clean calculation without null characters
shares = 2982810591
price = 9.51
# Balance sheet
total_assets = 57384156000.0
current_assets = 13041808000.0
cash = 4161939000.0
financial_investments = 632000.0
current_liabilities = 10342380000.0
short_loans = 3256315000.0
long_loans = 13989844000.0
equity = 25636935000.0
# Income statement
revenue_12 = 22651036000.0
gross_profit_12 = 4891244000.0
ebit_12 = 4064248000.0
dep_amort_12 = 1465478000.0
net_income_12 = 2799370000.0
net_income_control_12 = 2809631000.0
# YTD Sep values
revenue_ytd_sep = 16631872000.0
ebit_ytd_sep = 3141617000.0
net_income_ytd_sep = 2224206000.0
# Calculations
disponibilidades = cash + financial_investments
gross_debt = short_loans + long_loans
net_debt = gross_debt - disponibilidades
market_cap = price * shares
EV = market_cap + gross_debt - disponibilidades
ebitda_12 = ebit_12 + dep_amort_12
revenue_per_share_12 = revenue_12 / shares
ebit_per_share_12 = ebit_12 / shares
net_income_per_share_12 = net_income_control_12 / shares
assets_per_share = total_assets / shares
current_assets_per_share = current_assets / shares
working_capital = current_assets - current_liabilities
working_capital_per_share = working_capital / shares
book_value_per_share = equity / shares
# Quarter (Oct-Dec)
revenue_q = revenue_12 - revenue_ytd_sep
ebit_q = ebit_12 - ebit_ytd_sep
net_income_q = net_income_12 - net_income_ytd_sep
# Ratios
pl = price / net_income_per_share_12 if net_income_per_share_12!=0 else None
pvp = price / book_value_per_share if book_value_per_share!=0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share_12 if ebit_per_share_12!=0 else None
psr = price / revenue_per_share_12 if revenue_per_share_12!=0 else None
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share!=0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / working_capital_per_share if working_capital_per_share!=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / current_assets_per_share if current_assets_per_share!=0 else None
ev_ebitda = EV / ebitda_12 if ebitda_12!=0 else None
ev_ebit = EV / ebit_12 if ebit_12!=0 else None
lpa = net_income_per_share_12
vpa = book_value_per_share
marg_bruta = gross_profit_12 / revenue_12 * 100 if revenue_12!=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_12 / revenue_12 * 100 if revenue_12!=0 else None
marg_liquida = net_income_12 / revenue_12 * 100 if revenue_12!=0 else None
ebit_over_assets = ebit_12 / total_assets * 100 if total_assets!=0 else None
fornecedores = 2324423000.0
roic_denom = total_assets - fornecedores - cash
roic = ebit_12 / roic_denom * 100 if roic_denom!=0 else None
roe = net_income_12 / equity * 100 if equity!=0 else None
liquidez_corr = current_assets / current_liabilities if current_liabilities!=0 else None
divbr_patrim = gross_debt / equity if equity!=0 else None
giro_ativos = revenue_12 / total_assets if total_assets!=0 else None
# Prepare final output mapping using exact indicator names from schema
final = [
    ("Ativo", total_assets),
    ("Disponibilidades", disponibilidades),
    ("Ativo Circulante", current_assets),
    ("Dí­v. Bruta".replace('í­','í'), gross_debt),
]
# Note: replacing weird sequence; instead we'll use proper keys as in schema list
# Build dictionary with exact keys from schema enum
results = {
 "Ativo": total_assets,
 "Disponibilidades": disponibilidades,
 "Ativo Circulante": current_assets,
 "Dí̂v. Bruta": gross_debt  # placeholder
}
# To avoid encoding issues, create final list matching schema exactly programmatically
schema_keys = [
"Ativo","Disponibilidades","Ativo Circulante","Dív. Bruta","Dív. Líquida","Patrim. Líq",
"Receita Líquida (12 meses)","EBIT (12 meses)","Lucro Líquido (12 meses)",
"Receita Líquida (3 meses)","EBIT (3 meses)","Lucro Líquido (3 meses)",
"P/L","P/VP","P/EBIT","PSR","P/Ativos","P/Cap. Giro","P/Ativ Circ Liq",
"EV / EBITDA","EV / EBIT","LPA","VPA","Marg. Bruta","Marg. EBIT","Marg. Líquida",
"EBIT / Ativo","ROIC","ROE","Liquidez Corr","Div Br/ Patrim","Giro Ativos"
]
values = {
"Ativo": total_assets,
"Disponibilidades": disponibilidades,
"Ativo Circulante": current_assets,
"Dív. Bruta": gross_debt,
"Dív. Líquida": net_debt,
"Patrim. Líq": equity,
"Receita Líquida (12 meses)": revenue_12,
"EBIT (12 meses)": ebit_12,
"Lucro Líquido (12 meses)": net_income_12,
"Receita Líquida (3 meses)": revenue_q,
"EBIT (3 meses)": ebit_q,
"Lucro Líquido (3 meses)": net_income_q,
"P/L": round(pl,2) if pl is not None else None,
"P/VP": round(pvp,2) if pvp is not None else None,
"P/EBIT": round(p_ebit,2) if p_ebit is not None else None,
"PSR": round(psr,2) if psr is not None else None,
"P/Ativos": round(p_ativos,2) if p_ativos is not None else None,
"P/Cap. Giro": round(p_cap_giro,2) if p_cap_giro is not None else None,
"P/Ativ Circ Liq": round(p_ativ_circ_liq,2) if p_ativ_circ_liq is not None else None,
"EV / EBITDA": round(ev_ebitda,2) if ev_ebitda is not None else None,
"EV / EBIT": round(ev_ebit,2) if ev_ebit is not None else None,
"LPA": round(lpa,6),
"VPA": round(vpa,6),
"Marg. Bruta": round(marg_bruta,2) if marg_bruta is not None else None,
"Marg. EBIT": round(marg_ebit,2) if marg_ebit is not None else None,
"Marg. Líquida": round(marg_liquida,2) if marg_liquida is not None else None,
"EBIT / Ativo": round(ebit_over_assets,2) if ebit_over_assets is not None else None,
"ROIC": round(roic,2) if roic is not None else None,
"ROE": round(roe,2) if roe is not None else None,
"Liquidez Corr": round(liquidez_corr,2) if liquidez_corr is not None else None,
"Div Br/ Patrim": round(divbr_patrim,2) if divbr_patrim is not None else None,
"Giro Ativos": round(giro_ativos,4) if giro_ativos is not None else None
}
# Print results
import json
print(json.dumps(values, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False))
values
"} }
